creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I observe this with USB mouse. Plugging/unplugging doesn't help. Restarting xorg helps, which suggests that the problem is in xorg, because it reopens the device every time it is plugged again and still has the problem.

Changing from kde4 to xfce4 doesn't help.

The upstream report: https://bugs.freedesktop.org/show_bug.cgi?id=98507
